info.english_meaning: to be confused to be afraid
info.hindI_arTa: citta vikala honA BrAnta honA Gabaq0A jAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' yupu ' iti DAtukAvye (2.67) pAWaH  ' uditpAWaH DAtuvfttyAdiviroDAt leKakapramAdAt AgataH ' iti bAlamanoramA
